falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low would invalidate the 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving this is not a similar bottoming structure and the macro engine's analog model is wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Blowoff score of 39 suggests controlled fear; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic escalation inconsistent with a bottom formation, invalidating the HOLD signal as a stabilization call

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety bid of that magnitude would signal recession/deleveraging not captured by the pattern match, proving the macro engine misidentified the regime and the bottom_2024_aug analog fails

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
